description: Score compliance risk for learners, programs, or org units using causal drivers and predict which areas are most likely to fail upcoming audits or miss targets.

transformations: compute composite risk_score per entity (learner, org_unit, program)
weight risk factors by causal edge strength
identify top risk_factors contributing to each score

cce_config.uses: risk factor weighting via causal edge strength — Shapley contribution to compliance_posture

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics that are predictive of future compliance state; deprioritize purely historical metrics
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include risk_contribution_weight (from causal graph) and whether it is a leading indicator (early warning) or lagging indicator (damage already done)
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: use causal edges to weight risk factors — metrics with strong causal paths to compliance_posture get higher risk_contribution_weight

penalty_rules: penalize metrics with no predictive value (purely historical snapshots) (-0.10)
penalize metrics disconnected from compliance_posture in causal graph (-0.08)
boost_rules: boost leading indicators with causal path to compliance outcome (+0.10)
boost metrics with both current_state and trend capability (+0.05)
boost metrics that correlate with audit findings (+0.08)
